title: Chif stone
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Chif_stone_pendant.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Chif stone pendant]]

'''Chif stones''' were organically produced minerals (much like [[Wikipedia:calcium carbonate|calcium carbonate]]) found on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Mauve in coloration, they were frequently used in art on that world.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1999-05-XX -->''[[Star Wars: Episode I: The Visual Dictionary]]''
